title: FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: BAKER COUNTY SENIOR CENTER FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry. Participants can visit once per month. Also offers fresh produce and bread. 2810 Cedar Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Food Pantry: Must meet USDA income limits Harvest Share: Unrestricted Hours: Food Pantry: Thursday 9am-11am Harvest Share: Thursday 10:30am-noon (541) 523-6591 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 523-6591 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Participants are asked to bring their own bags. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Baker County Services: Food Pantries Fresh Food Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SENIOR CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BAKER COUNTY SENIOR CENTER
